text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Curren Chan and I have come to a
racecourse to spectate a race we might aim for in
the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a wonderful event! ♪ Just look how
excited the audience is!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And it's only just started... Now I'm getting
excited too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing she should see what it's like to watch
the winners dancing from the audience's point of
view, we also attend the winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know this part! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Kyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, this makes me wanna dance too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, this makes me wanna dance too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think I could dance really well right now. I'll
make sure not to bother anyone...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So... can I? Pleeeeease?
choice_data_list: If you want to dance, let's go somewhere else.

Sorry, but you should focus on watching the
concert.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hooray! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On that note, we go to a park where there aren't
too many people. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Hm, hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Woman Passing By
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Who's she?! She's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Running Man
text_block_list.text: An angel! There's an angel right there! Ahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The instant Curren Chan starts dancing, our
surroundings become abuzz with the voices of
passersby. She's even cuter than usual today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ♪ Should I get a little more serious?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If she does, even more chaos will ensue!
choice_data_list: Actually, let's call it here for today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww... But why? No fair!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww... But why? No fair!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I had fun, though, so... I guess I'll forgive you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've learned today that I can't let Curren Chan do
impromptu dances in public.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww, you're so strict today...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww, you're so strict today...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Pleeease! I wanna shine too! Pretty pweeease?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stares at me with puppy-dog eyes, but this is
for her sake too! I can't just give in.
choice_data_list: Sorry, but I'm putting my foot down!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're so... adamant about this. I didn't know you
felt so strongly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're so... adamant about this. I didn't know you
felt so strongly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: B-but I...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... P-Pretty... pweeease! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on Stage
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Thank you for coming today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No way... It's already over?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow... I didn't realize you had it in you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow... I didn't realize you had it in you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It looks like things are gonna get a little
more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says that, I see determination well up in
her eyes!
